entry.title: Unable to purchase SAP certification exam
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I've prepared for a couple of SAP certifications and wanted to purchase CER006 subscription for 6 SAP certification attempts. Unfortunately, on training.sap.com , I get to page for CER006 but I'm unable to find the book/purchase option. CER006 - SAP Certification Exam, Six Attempts | SAP Training

I've tried multiple browsers, cleared cache etc. Just to test my ID, I tried booking a random course and there I do get option to book but just not for CER006(or CER001)

Has anyone faced similar issues. Ant help on how to go about this would be highly appreciated.

Thanks,

AMRITA

entry.title: SAP learning exercise- no access
entry.content:
Hi, is there currently a problem with exercise access? I doing the learning for C_S4CFI and currently under AR. The exercises did work last week but now I can not get access. It does not state anything, it opens new sheet but nothing happens. I have tried with Chrome and Edge. 

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/describing-the-receivables-management-process-in-sap-s-4hana/creating-customer-master-data_e2cd30c1-8722-41c4-a8a5-d1d0a14a49e8

entry.title: Learning Class example different with current practice
entry.content: Hi, i found different example from class and my ABAP cloud project. I can't find /dmo/flight. Here's the screenshot

entry.title: How to schedule SAP certification exam without Learning hub subscription.
entry.content:
Hi,

Recently I tried to schedule exam for SAP Certification C_TS452_2410 from learning.sap.com, I found that to schedule exam you need to subscribe SAP learning hub which cost around USD1392.

Is there any way to schedule exam without learning hub subscription ?

Please help me out !

Thank you.

Sujit

entry.title: Credly certificate
entry.content: I have completed the BTM3 learnings but have yet to receive the credly certificate.

entry.title: Controlling Reports: Aging Reports - Calculation errors in SAP B1 TB_1100 training manual
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I was preparing a training session on the Controlling Reports: Aging Reports using the training Manual when I come across to calculation errors of the Balance Due, Aging Intervals and the Percentages on the training Manual TB-1100 (page 225 or 235 on slide).

I request the update of this to ensure consistency and correctness of the training data.

Below the screen with the errors and attached is the correct information.

"...In the image you can see both A/R invoices for Funtech the customer and A/P invoices for Funtech the
vendor. The total balance due took into consideration the A/P invoices amount."

Best Regards

Santos Joao

entry.title: Urgent: Issues with SAP Certification Renewal and Learning Hub Subscription
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am reaching out to share my recent experience and seek guidance regarding the renewal of my SAP certification and the purchase of an individual Learning Hub subscription.

I have been an SAP consultant for 13 years, working both as a partner and now as a customer. Recently, I received a notification to extend the validity of my SAP certification. Upon realizing that I needed to purchase a Learning Hub subscription, I informed my manager, who encouraged me to keep my certification valid. Consequently, I purchased an individual Learning Hub subscription on Thursday (Order ID: 0002281064).

To my surprise, I did not receive any confirmation or access to the Learning Hub even after 24 hours. I raised multiple support tickets but struggled to get a proper response. On Sunday, I finally received a response from an SAP store admin, who mistakenly treated my request as a partner request. After clarifying that it was an individual request, they informed me that they couldn't fulfill the order and suggested purchasing certification attempts instead.

I am utterly surprised and annoyed by this response and the lack of maturity from SAP Learning support. Here are my concerns:

  1. What are the guidelines for maintaining SAP certification validity, especially when changing companies? Do certifications lapse with a change in organization?
  2. Where can I find relevant support and guidance for individual certification renewal and Learning Hub subscriptions?
  3. Why is there no proper channel or guidance to address these issues?

I believe it is crucial for people to be aware of these challenges. I am on the verge of losing my certification due to the lack of proper guidance from SAP. I hope this post brings attention to the issue and helps others who might be facing similar challenges.

Thank you for your support and guidance.

SAP Learning Solution  Certification  SAP Extended Warehouse Management @Pa_Vi

entry.title: Can't see your certifications? Complete your SAP Universal ID setup
entry.content:
Your SAP Universal ID might be missing a secondary email address. This additional email is required for account recovery purposes and to
manage your certifications effectively. Please add at least one additional email address by visiting the Universal ID account manager.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP learning journey
entry.content:
Dear SAP professionals,

I'm a Data Analyst and aspiring Data Scientist working in a financial team within the banking industry. 

SAP universe is pretty new to me, and I'd like to understand the basics for my next job. What learning journey would you recommend? I was considering following this 12-course curriculum:

Intro

  • Learning the Basics of SAP Fiori
  • Introducing the Banking Industry
  • Provisioning Data to SAP HANA

S/4HANA

  • Overview of Financials in SAP S/4HANA
  • Discovering SAP S/4HANA embedded analytics
  • Outlining Cost Management and Profitability Analysis in SAP S/4HANA

BW/4HANA

  • Creating Queries in SAP BW/4HANA
  • Implementing a Data Warehouse Using SAP BW/4HANA
  • Developing Regression Models with the Python Machine Learning Client for SAP HANA

SAC & BO

  • Leveraging SAP Analytics Cloud Functionality for Enterprise Planning
  • Learning the Basics of SAP BI
  • Discovering SAP BusinessObjects Web Intelligence

From what I learned so far, BW/4HANA seems to be the data architecture behind S/4HANA (Fiori being the GUI), which is the business layer, then SAC is the global analytics solution for all SAP products (replacing the traditional BO).

Please let me know if that sounds coherent, according to your know-how (maybe I don't need to learn S/4HANA, or need to learn more about SAC...). Any feedback is welcome!

Thanks a lot for your guidance

entry.title: Learning Hub Partner Edition - Four attempts for certification
entry.content:
Hi colleagues!

Not so long ago we bought a SAP Learning Hub Subscription - Partner Edition so one of our consultants can take the assessment and comply with the Stay Certified program. 

We're seeing that after he activated the subscription 4 attempts were made available. Today we bought one more license for another consultant and was activated successfully. My question is:

Are the 4 attempts per user or global for all user licenses that we acquire?

For example:
2 Users = 4 attempts per user = 8 attempts in total.

2 Users or more = 4 attempts in total.

In my understanding the attempts should be per user and not limited to 4 globally. Am I correct about this?

Thanks in advance for your help!

Kind regards!

entry.title: Haven’t received digital badge (UID already set up)
entry.content:
Yesterday I had successfully passed the certification for SAP Certified Associate- SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Private Edition,Management Accounting and yet haven’t received the email from the digital badge and it also hasn’t appeared on my certification list.

I had setup my universal ID and previously passed another exam with different topic and the digital badge was immediately sent to my email

And I already raise the ticket about this issue with the reference number 5000164860 and no response yet

entry.title: SAP ABAP RAP - Missing value on UI after data created
entry.content:
Dear All,

I encounter an issue where my RAP Application does not return value on UI after created.

The scenario I follow is using /DMO/travel and /DMO/booking (One Travel can have multiple booking)

For example i choose travel number 4136, then i want to create another item booking. I fill the data here then i click save.

After click save, UI not return the data i have just filled, only the price value show up:

 

I am using unmanaged RAP, not sure what is wrong. I do check at Method cba_booking here, this should do the job to return the value to UI.

Appreciate your help and answer.

Thanks.

entry.title: SAP BTP Trial Account Published Services Not Working
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have published few services in SAP BTP Trial Account, and these services are not working at all but old services are working fine.

  1. For V2 service the preview is total blank
  2. For V4 it is popping up "Could not open App. Please try again later."
  3. For Service URL it is giving error "The request has been blocked by UCON.

Please find the attached screenshot for reference.  Has anyone experienced this issue.

entry.title: Training Hub Down?
entry.content:
I've been trying to register for a class for a week but keep getting this error at check out:

   Internal Server Error

 
     There seems to be an error on the SAP Training Shop at the moment. Please try again later.

Is this a known issue???

Thanks

entry.title: Is "free" course completion viewable to LH admins for licensed learners?
entry.content: We have 500+ program team members that require SAP training. We have assigned S-User IDs and recommended a combination of "free" & "subscription" courses. Will the dashboard or analytics allow us to see the learning status of our S-Users regardless of free or subscription? 300 of our learners have Learning Hub licenses and we'd like to see both their free and subscription learning progress. 200 of our learners are only take free content but we would like to be able to view that progress too. Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: How to obtain support for the training.sap.com portal?
entry.content:
How to obtain support for the training.sap.com portal?

entry.title: Best course & where to train as SAP Concur Admin (Professional)? Tips welcome!
entry.content: Hi SAP Community, I am looking to become a SAP Concur Administrator with full access to technical configurations within the platform (Professional Edition). What is the best course or certification to become a qualified SAP Concur Administrator, with a focus on technical configurations such as audit rules, expense types, approval workflows, corporate card setup, user management, and policy compliance? Where do you recommend taking this training? Any insights, personal experiences, or recommendations would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: SAP SFX Administration Masterclasses
entry.content:
Hi All,

Do you guys know what happened to the SAP SFX Administration Masterclasses that were offered to customers?

They were always posted here, however there have not been any updates since last year.

SAP SFX Administration Masterclasses

Thanks!

entry.title: Where is the slide deck for the recorded trainings?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking for the slide deck for trainings that had been recorded.
One example,

Building the Implementation Team & Managing Change during SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Projects – SAP SuccessFactors

I can watch the recording, but can't find any slide deck that is mentioned in the training itself.
Thank you.

entry.title: Tips for a Trainee in IBP Portifolio Management
entry.content:
Hello, this is the first time I am using this platform.
It's been almost 3 months I was hired to work as IBP consultant and for a couple of weeks and on I have been trying to assist a IBP Portifolio Manager at my company. 

This small shift caused me to change my goals and now I am lost. 

Would you guys tell me some tips, maybe a roadmap, things that I need to do,  both soft and hard skills, to excel at this challenge?

Now, I am reading stuff about SAP Activate and participating at MS Teams meetings, and it seems not enough preparation for that job to me. 

Thanks in advance.
